title: dactylis glomerata f. ibizensis
intro: Dactylis glomerata f. ibizensis, also known as Ibiza grass or coastal bentgrass, is a subspecies of the Dactylis glomerata grass species, which is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata f. ibizensis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Dactylis glomerata f. ibizensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the dried leaves and flowers of the plant.
